# bip137sig.new_entropy

Generate fresh random entropy of a given size, suitable for producing a BIP-39 mnemonic.

## Arguments

* bits (int) – Entropy size in bits. Must be one of `128`, `160`, `192`, `224`, `256`. Defaults to `128` if omitted or `0`.

## Returned objects

The operation returns one of:
* An `error_message` object if `bits` is invalid or the system RNG fails.
* A `bip137sig.entropy` object holding the freshly generated bytes.

## Examples

```shellsession
$ astral-query bip137sig.new_entropy -out json
{"Type":"bip137sig.entropy","Object":"a1b2c3d4e5f60718293a4b5c6d7e8f90"}
```

```shellsession
$ astral-query bip137sig.new_entropy -bits 256 -out json
{"Type":"bip137sig.entropy","Object":"0f1e2d3c4b5a69788796a5b4c3d2e1f00f1e2d3c4b5a69788796a5b4c3d2e1f0"}
```
